summary: Exceptional audience recording captures a party‑ready show with both Bird Song and Let It Grow appearing in the same set.
review: Rango Keshavan’s crowd tape delivers superb clarity, capturing the full frequency spectrum thanks to his masterful use of a Sony D‑5 cassette deck and ECM‑220 microphones. The performance matches that fidelity – reviewers note a generous setlist that includes both Bird Song and Let It Grow in one set, exemplifying the band’s commitment to good‑old party music. Overall the recording and show are praised as high‑quality and highly enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are strongly positive (average 4.33★) and comment favorably on both audio fidelity and the show’s setlist, indicating an excellent performance captured by a top‑tier audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape praised for full‑spectrum capture; superb use of Sony D‑5 cassette deck and ECM‑220 mics yields crisp, clear sound with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlight a generous first set that includes both Bird Song and Let It Grow, indicating no rationing of jam‑heavy songs and a lively party atmosphere.
